code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut evens = ""
mut odds = ""
mut cur = ""
mut i = 0
while i <= n
  let b = if i < n
    match string.byte_at(input, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      32
    end
  else
    32
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if not string.is_empty(cur)
      match string.parse_int(cur)
      when Some(x)
        if x % 2 == 0
          if string.is_empty(evens)
            evens = "#{x}"
          else
            evens = "#{evens} #{x}"
          end
        else
          if string.is_empty(odds)
            odds = "#{x}"
          else
            odds = "#{odds} #{x}"
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      cur = ""
    end
  else
    cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println("evens=#{evens}")
println("odds=#{odds}")
